title: PureCraft
description: A lightweight Vanilla+ modpack that aims to enhance quality of life, performance, and exploration while maintaining a familiar and well-balanced core Minecraft experience.
body:
## PureCraft

### PureCraft - A Vanilla+ Experience

- PureCraft is a straightforward Vanilla+ modpack designed to make the classic Minecraft experience more enjoyable and captivating. The goal of this project is to improve the vanilla game with small, deliberate changes, such as improved exploration, subtle quality-of-life adjustments, and minor gameplay enhancements, without altering the essential mechanics that players adore. This project aims to improve the vanilla game by making modest, deliberate changes, such as improved exploration, subtle quality of life adjustments, and minor gameplay additions, without altering the essential elements that players like.

- The goal of PureCraft is to make Minecraft feel more refined without overwhelming players with unnecessary complexity or drastic changes. With better performance, balanced enhancements, and immersive improvements, PureCraft delivers a familiar yet refreshed survival experience that stays true to what makes Minecraft enjoyable.
